completed_steps.summary: Classified Aurelius as a single-part protocol knowledge-base repository rather than a software runtime project.
Found existing documentation in README.md, AGENTS.md, and docs/*.md.
Identified JSON, Markdown, and Python as the primary repository technologies.
Performed quick pattern-based scan of protocol data, research data, docs, source archive, and tooling layout.
Generated BMAD-adapted project documentation for the Aurelius knowledge base.
Validated generated docs for presence, links, and JSON readability.

project_classification.architecture_type: structured protocol data with generated documentation

technology_stack.tech_summary: JSON protocol/research data, Markdown documentation, Python extraction script, Git/GitHub versioning, local ignored BMAD tooling.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed; rerun bmad-document-project for a full rescan or deep dive.
